items.title: Stock Market LIVE: GIFT Nifty hints at lower start amid muted global cues; Asian markets down
items.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE: GIFT Nifty was trading at 25,719.5 levels, down by 131.5 points, indicating a lower start amid muted global cues.

items.title: Technical stock picks by Bonanza: Max Financial, Muthoot, Bharat Forge
items.description: Max Financial, Muthoot Finance and Bharat Forge show strong breakouts. Know entry levels, stop loss and upside targets

items.title: Bajaj Finance Options strategy: HDFC Securities suggests Bull Call Spread
items.description: Nandish Shah of HDFC Securities suggests Bajaj Finance bull call spread for 24 Feb expiry. Check cost, max profit, breakeven, margin, and technical rationale

items.title: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery IPO opens Feb 24: Check price band, size, dates
items.description: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery IPO, which opens on Feb 24, 2026, has set a price band of ₹367-386. Read to find out  IPO lot size, issue size, likely listing date and objectives

items.title: HAL's ₹2.4 trn order book to propel manufacturing revenue, says analysts
items.description: HAL Share: In the December quarter, HAL posted a 30 per cent jump in year-on-year (Y-o-Y) rise in net profit for Q3FY26 to ₹1,866.68 crore, compared to ₹1,439.83 crore in Q3FY25

items.title: Mamaearth parent Honasa Consumer soars 7% as Q3 performance lifts sentiment
items.description: The parent of Mamaearth,  Honasa Consumer, reported a 92.9 per cent jump in its consolidated profit at ₹50.2 crore in the December quarter of FY26

items.title: HUL slips 4% in 2-days post Q3; brokerages remain cautiously optimistic
items.description: The selling pressure on the counter came after brokerages stayed cautiously constructive on HUL, with execution and volume-led growth need to improve, while margins are anticipated to stay stable.

items.title: Stocks to Watch today: Coal India, SpiceJet, HUL, Biocon, Infosys, IRCTC
items.description: Stocks to watch today, Friday, February 13, 2026: Market participants will keep an eye on SpiceJet, Coal India, Biocon, Infosys, Mishra Dhatu Nigam, Indraprastha Gas share prices today

items.title: Infosys, Wipro ADRs slump up to 10% as global tech selloff persists
items.description: Over the past two trading sessions, the Nifty IT index has declined 7 per cent, while losses over the last seven trading days stand at 14 per cent

items.title: Sensex falls 900 pts, Nifty below 25,600: Why are markets falling today?
items.description: The BSE Sensex tumbled 903 points in the intraday to hit a low of 82,771.775, and the NSE Nifty50 also slipped below the 25,550 mark in the intraday to hit a low of 25,525

items.title: Sensex sheds 3,000 pts in 9 days, Nifty tests 25,500; what next for market?
items.description: Despite the sharp volatility, the Nifty is seen holding above the 20-DMA and 200-DMA on the technical charts; analysts see 25,500 as the key support for now.

items.title: Bharat Forge hits 52-week high after posting Q3; most brokerages hike TP
items.description: Looking ahead into the March 2026 quarter (Q4FY26) and the financial year 2026-27 (FY27), the management said that the worst is behind the company and things are starting to look up

items.title: Puravankara shares soar 11% as December quarter swings to profit
items.description: This single quarter's performance has meaningfully offset a large part of the cumulative losses recorded in the previous two quarters, Puravankara said

items.title: Hindalco Industries shares slide 6% even as India operations meet estimates
items.description: Hindalco Industries posted consolidated profit after tax (PAT) of ₹2,049 crore in Q3FY26, down from ₹3,735 crore a year earlier

items.title: India's growth potential not reflected in foreign allocations: Amundi
items.description: Foreign investors net sold nearly $23 billion of Indian stocks between January 2025 and 2026, pushing allocations to the country to decadal lows

items.title: Nifty IT index tanks 10% in 2 days; TCS, Infy, Wipro slump to 52-week lows
items.description: The Nasdaq IT services basket has corrected meaningfully, dragging Indian IT ADRs lower and triggering a risk-off sentiment that has spilled into domestic markets, said ICICI Securities.

items.title: Ingersoll Rand jumps 9% to over 2-month high on positive growth outlook
items.description: Ingersoll Rand (India) share price rose 8.8 per cent to ₹3,849.90, the highest level since November 26, 2025 on the National Stock Exchange (NSE)

items.title: Engineers India shares surge 16% to 1-month high on strong Q3 net profit
items.description: Engineers India rose as much as 15.9 per cent to ₹209.7, the highest level since January 7 on the National Stock Exchange (NSE)

items.title: Muthoot Finance shares plunge 12% despite strong Q3; MOFSL stays 'Neutral'
items.description: Muthoot Finance shares fell over 12% on NSE and BSE amid gold price volatility despite strong Q3FY26 results. Motilal Oswal maintains Neutral rating, but increases target price

items.title: Eternal vs Swiggy: Shares surge up to 8% in Feb; which one should you buy?
items.description: Delivery platform stocks Eternal and Swiggy are showing a positive trend after 4 months. Kunal Shah, technical analyst at Mirae Asset Sharekhan helps decode trading strategies in these 2 stocks.

items.title: Defence index trades firm in weak market, rises 4% in one week; here's why
items.description: At 11:15 AM on Friday; the Nifty India Defence was the sole sectoral index trading in green and up 0.08 per cent, as compared to 1 per cent decline in the Nifty 50.

items.title: SpiceJet shares drop 3% after Q3 swings to loss; stock lowest since 2015
items.description: SpiceJet's total income declined 6.6 per cent year-on-year (Y-o-Y) to ₹1,545 crore, while total expenses rose 9.4 per cent YoY to ₹1,787 crore

items.title: Nifty Metal falls 3% as investors book profit; buy the dips, say analysts
items.description: Thus far in CY26, the Nifty Metal has been the best sectoral index that moved up around 10 per cent during this period, ACE Equity data shows. In comparison, the Nifty 50 index lost nearly 1 per cent

items.title: Eicher Motors extends rally on solid Q3 performance; surges 19% in 10 days
items.description: To cater the increasing demand, the Eicher's board has approved a proposal for capacity expansion at Royal Enfield, taking annual production capacity upto 2 mn units from the existing 1.46 mn units.

items.title: ONGC shares slide 4% even as Q3 earnings come in line with estimates
items.description: ONGC's consolidated net profit rose 22.6 per cent year-on-year (Y-o-Y) to ₹11,946 crore in the third quarter of fiscal 2025-26. The firm's revenue from operations in Q3 remained flat

items.title: Coal India Q3 review: Analysts split on e-auction recovery vs headwinds
items.description: In the December quarter, the company reported a 15.8 per cent decline in consolidated net profit at ₹7,157.45 crore, as compared to ₹8,505.57 crore a year ago

items.title: Indian Hotels slips 4% despite strong Q3 show; brokerages stay bullish
items.description: Indian Hotels Company reported a net profit of ₹954.2 crore, up 50.2 per cent compared to ₹635.2 crore in the year-ago period

items.title: Don't miss the cut! 50 stocks to reward investors with dividend next week
items.description: Dividend stocks: Among the dividend announcements, Escorts Kubota has declared the highest interim dividend of ₹18 per share, followed by Torent Power and Nirlon at ₹15

items.title: APTEL dismisses IEX's plea to quash market-coupling order; stock drops 5%
items.description: APTEL dismissed Indian Energy Exchange's plea to quash Central Electricity Regulatory Commission's (CERC) July 2025 direction to implement market coupling.

items.title: Textile stocks rebound; Gokaldas, Vardhman, KPR Mill, Arvind soar up to 10%
items.description: Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal has indicated India may secure zero-duty textile access to the US, matching a tax relief granted to Bangladesh that has put Indian exporters under pressure.

items.title: Chaman Lal Setia Exports zooms 17% on huge volumes; here's why
items.description: Looking ahead, the reduction of the United States (US) import tariffs from 25 per cent to 18 per cent is a significant structural tailwind for the company, the management said.

items.title: Rategain Travel Technologies tanks 16% to over 5-month low post Q3 result
items.description: Rategain Travel Technologies share price slumped 15.9 per cent to ₹480.5 per share, the lowest level since August 18, 2025, on the National Stock Exchange (NSE)

items.title: NSE revises ARC, cuts connectivity and colo charges by 50% on select days
items.description: Exchange offers 50% reduction in annual recovery charges for connectivity and colocation services on Wednesdays and Thursdays

items.title: BSE gets Sebi approval for derivatives on BSE Focused Midcap index
items.description: Exchange to launch cash-settled monthly futures and options on BSE Focused Midcap Index, widening its derivatives offerings

items.title: Gains for Hindustan Unilever stock depend on pace of growth recovery
items.description: HUL posts steady volume growth and stable margins; FY27 outlook hinges on demand revival, pricing trends and execution of new strategy
